nasb.text: But someone came and reported to them, “The men whom you put in prison are standing in the temple and teaching the people!”

esv.text: And someone came and told them, “Look! The men whom you put in prison are standing in the temple and teaching the people.”

cnv.text: 忽然有人來報告說：“你們押在監裡的那些人，正站在殿裡教導眾民呢！”

ccb.text: 这时有人来报告说：“你们关押在牢里的人正在圣殿里教导人！”

csbs.text: 这时，有人来向他们报告说：“看，你们关在监狱里的那些人，正站在圣殿里教导民众呢！”
